response.overview: One winter evening, under the conditions of a state of emergency and quarantine due to the COVID-19 pandemic, Farid and Salima's young son goes out without announcing his destination. The mother is worried and tries to contact him, but she cannot reach him. She urges her husband to go out and fetch him. Between worry, confinement, and the stress of remote work, the atmosphere at home becomes tense. The weather worsens, power outages occur, tension rises a notch and turns into a confrontation between the mother and the father.
response.title: اتصال
